debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
as bs cs : List α
⊢ @appendLists α (@appendLists α as bs) cs = @appendLists α as (@appendLists α bs cs)

proof:
revert as bs cs
  intro as bs cs
  induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> induction bs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try rfl
  <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction bs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try rfl
failed_attempts:
have h : ∀ {α : Type*} (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro α as bs cs
    induction as with
    | nil => simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
      <;> rw [ih]
      <;> simp [appendLists, List.cons_append]
  exact h as bs cs

have h : ∀ {α : Type*} (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro α as bs cs
    induction as with
    | nil => simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
  exact h as bs cs

simp [appendLists]
  <;>
  induction as with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;>
    induction bs with
    | nil => rfl
    | cons b bs ih' =>
      simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
      <;>
      induction cs with
      | nil => rfl
      | cons c cs ih'' =>
        simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
        <;>
        try simp_all [List.cons_append]
        <;>
        try ring_nf at *
        <;>
        try linarith

-- Use the `simp` tactic to unfold the definition of `appendLists` and apply associativity of list concatenation.
  simp [appendLists]
  <;>
  simp_all [List.cons_append, List.append_assoc]
  <;>
  rfl

simple [ appendLists ]
  <;> simp_all [ appendLists ]
  <;> rfl
  <;> simp_all [ appendLists ]
  <;> rfl
  <;> simp_all [ appendLists ]
  <;> rfl

have h : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by sorry
  sorry

have h_main : ∀ {α : Type*} (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro α as bs cs
    induction as with
    | nil =>
      -- Base case: when as is nil
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      -- Inductive step: assume the statement holds for as, prove for a :: as
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists])
      <;>
      simp_all [List.cons_append, List.append_assoc]
      <;>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      simp_all [List.cons_append, List.append_assoc]
  -- Apply the main lemma to the specific case
  apply h_main
successful_attempts:
revert as bs cs
  intro as bs cs
  induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> induction bs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try rfl
  <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction bs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try rfl

induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;>
  (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
  (try ring_nf at *) <;>
  (try linarith)

induction as with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;> simp_all [append_assoc]
    <;> try simp_all [List.cons_append]
    <;> try simp_all [append_assoc]
    <;> try simp_all [List.cons_append]
    <;> try simp_all [append_assoc]

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons_append]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.append_assoc]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.append_assoc])

have h : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as
    induction as with
    | nil =>
      intro bs cs
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      intro bs cs
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
      <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  exact h as bs cs

induction as with
  | nil =>
    -- Base case: when as is an empty list
    simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    -- Inductive step: assume the statement holds for as, prove for a :: as
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at *)
    <;>
    (try aesop)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at *)
    <;>
    (try aesop)

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih => simp_all [appendLists]

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;> rw [ih]
    <;> simp [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;> rfl

induction as with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
    (try ring_nf at *) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try rfl) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons, List.nil]) <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil])
    <;>
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons, List.nil]
    <;>
    try ring_nf at *
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]
    <;>
    try linarith
    <;>
    try rfl
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons, List.nil]
    <;>
    try simp_all [List.cons, List.nil]

-- Prove the associativity of the `appendLists` function using induction on `as`.
  induction as with
  | nil => simp
  | cons a as ih =>
    -- Base case: when `as` is empty, the result is straightforward.
    -- Inductive step: assume the statement holds for `as`, prove for `a :: as`.
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try ring_nf at *)
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [List.cons_append])
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists])

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp [appendLists] at *
    <;> rw [ih]
    <;> simp [appendLists]

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]

have h : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as bs cs
    induction as with
    | nil =>
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      have h₁ : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by assumption
      <;>
      simp_all [List.cons_append]
  exact h as bs cs

induction as <;> induction bs <;> induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists, List.cons, List.nil]
  <;> try norm_num
  <;> try ring
  <;> try aesop

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    aesop

induction as with
  | nil => simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]

induction as with
  | nil =>
    simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp [appendLists] at *
    <;>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    simp_all [appendLists]

induction as with
  | nil => rfl
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;> try simp_all [appendLists]
  <;> try simp_all [appendLists]

induction as <;> simp_all [List.append_assoc]
  <;> try ring_nf at *
  <;> try aesop

induction as with
  | nil =>
    simp [appendLists]
  | cons a as ih =>
    simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists])
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists]
    <;>
    try simp_all [appendLists]

have h_main : (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    induction as generalizing bs cs with
    | nil =>
      simp [appendLists]
    | cons a as ih =>
      simp_all [appendLists]
      <;>
      (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
      (try aesop)
      <;>
      (try
        {
          simp_all [appendLists]
          <;>
          (try ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [appendLists])
          <;>
          (try aesop)
        })
  exact h_main

induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
  <;> try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append]
  <;> try ring_nf at *
  <;> try aesop

induction as <;> simp_all [appendLists]
  <;>
  (try simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
  (try induction bs <;> simp_all [appendLists]) <;>
  (try simp_all [appendLists])
  <;>
  (try induction cs <;> simp_all [appendLists])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [appendLists])

have h : ∀ (as bs cs : List α), (as +' bs) +' cs = as +' (bs +' cs) := by
    intro as bs cs
    induction as <;>
    (try simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append, List.append_assoc]) <;>
    (try { intros; simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append, List.append_assoc] }) <;>
    (try { aesop }) <;>
    (try { ring_nf at * <;> simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append, List.append_assoc] }) <;>
    (try { simp_all [appendLists, List.cons_append, List.append_assoc] }) <;>
    (try { nlinarith })
  apply h
